import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; const Home = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [currentSlide, setCurrentSlide] = useState(0); const slides = [ { title: "Advanced Medical Equipment", description: "State-of-the-art diagnostic machines for accurate results", icon: "🏥", gradient: "from-blue-600 to-blue-800" }, { title: "Expert Medical Team", description: "Experienced doctors and healthcare professionals", icon: "👨‍⚕️", gradient: "from-green-600 to-green-800" }, { title: "Modern Laboratory", description: "Comprehensive lab testing with quick turnaround", icon: "🔬", gradient: "from-purple-600 to-purple-800" }, { title: "24/7 Emergency Care", description: "Round-the-clock emergency medical services", icon: "🚑", gradient: "from-red-600 to-red-800" }, { title: "Digital Health Records", description: "Secure and accessible patient management system", icon: "💻", gradient: "from-indigo-600 to-indigo-800" } ]; useEffect(() => { const timer = setInterval(() => { setCurrentSlide((prev) => (prev + 1) % slides.length); }, 4000); return () => clearInterval(timer); }, [slides.length]); const goToSlide = (index) => { setCurrentSlide(index); }; return (

); }; export default Home;
